role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the linguistic domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on tree morphology (Eucalyptus) and grass types, staying within botanical scope.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (poles, bollards, road width) and driving context.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole design + delineator style) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Australia. All agents adhered to their roles, providing concrete, image-grounded evidence (e.g., Eucalyptus morphology, specific utility pole styles). The tournament effectively used this evidence to eliminate distractors (Brazil, USA) and confirm the truth.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and low-density housing match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of the tree's pale bark and sparse canopy match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of wooden poles and white delineators match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of infrastructure cues is visually grounded.
